settings.editor: Learn more about Summit Family Cosmetic Dentistry

settings.title: A Trusted Dental Home in Summit, NJ

settings.editor: Summit Family & Cosmetic Dentistry is a full-service dental practice located in the heart of Summit, New Jersey, dedicated to providing comprehensive care for patients of all ages. The practice has built lasting relationships in the community through a commitment to advanced technology, patient comfort, and personalized treatment. From routine preventive care to complex implant cases, every patient receives attentive, expert care from a team that genuinely cares about their outcomes. The office features the latest digital tools, including CBCT 3D imaging, the iTero scanner, and chairside digital displays, so you can see and understand every step of your treatment.

Dr. Blake Bandeff earned his DMD from the University of Connecticut School of Dental Medicine in Farmington, CT and completed his General Practice Residency at Morristown Medical Center in Morristown, NJ, where he developed a genuine focus on implants, wisdom teeth extractions, and cosmetic cases. He completes 50+ hours of continuing education annually, staying current with the latest techniques and technology. His approach centers on attentive, personalized care, taking the time to understand each patient's concerns before recommending treatment. Dr. Bandeff is a member of the American Dental Association, the New Jersey Dental Association, and the Academy of General Dentistry. Outside the office, he enjoys traveling with his family, golfing in the summer, and snowboarding in the winter.

Dentistry is a profession that offers me both fulfillment and a sense of purpose. The ability to transform lives through comprehensive oral healthcare, from restoring smiles to relieving pain and enhancing overall well-being, is what drives my passion for dentistry. I am inspired by the blend of artistry, scientific expertise, and patient care that dentistry demands. The field's constant advancements and innovative techniques keep me motivated to continually expand my knowledge and skills. What keeps me motivated is witnessing the confidence and self-esteem that a healthy smile can bring to my patients.

Dr. Mina Salib is a dedicated and accomplished dentist, a graduate of the Rutgers School of Dental Medicine, with extensive experience in both conventional and digital dentistry. His comprehensive clinical training encompasses multiple disciplines, including restorative dentistry, prosthodontics, periodontics, pediatric dentistry, endodontics, and oral surgery.

Dr. Salib is dedicated to delivering stress-free dentistry through a patient-centered approach that prioritizes comfort, trust, and clinical excellence. He has significant experience in developing and executing complex, multidisciplinary treatment plans, with a particular focus on comprehensive dental care, esthetic dentistry, and Invisalign treatment to achieve functional, natural, and long-lasting outcomes.

Dr. Salib’s advanced education includes completion of implant surgery and restoration training with an International Team of Implantology, graduation from the American Academy of Implant Dentistry’s MaxiCourse in implant dentistry.

Outside of his professional practice, Dr. Mina Salib maintains an active lifestyle and values spending quality time with his family. He enjoys playing tennis and soccer, exploring local dining establishments, following Liverpool Football Club in the Premier League, and relaxing with loved ones.

Our office is located at 33 Overlook Rd, Suite 402, in the heart of Summit, NJ, offering a modern, comfortable environment with stunning views. We are committed to providing quality healthcare to families in the Summit area and treat patients of all ages. The practice serves patients throughout Union County and surrounding communities.

settings.editor: At Summit Family & Cosmetic Dentistry, every patient receives a customized treatment plan based on their goals, concerns, and health history. Dr. Bandeff and his team believe that informed patients are confident patients, taking the time to walk through every option before any procedure begins. From routine checkups to full-mouth restorations, you receive the same attentive, personal care every visit.
